narrative.narrative: As gold strengthens and USD weakens, Bitcoin hovers around $63k, mirroring the August 2024 bottom's sideways pattern. Traders navigate choppy waters, awaiting clearer signals.
narrative.headline: Gold & USD Dance: Bitcoin in Holding Pattern
